productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Swiss Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionMustard yellow polo neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with ribbed collar and cuff, embroidered logo on left chest, short buttoned placket, mustard fabric tape on inseam of the collar, vented hem, tri-colored flag on right chest and number &ldquo 06&rdquo appliqued on the right sleeveFittingSlimWash care Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Wash in cold water Rinse thoroughly Iron at low temperature Dry in shade on reverse side Tumble wash/dry This mustard yellow tee from classic polo redefines casual chic. While the subdued mustard gives off a sense of maturity, the bright purple colored logos add a splash of liveliness to this tee. Team it with jeans or chinos, and look as comfortable and cool as you feel.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
